cycleNotes: Cycle 8: 32 signals (consistent high harvest). ADO triage hits 170 total (8 unbroken cycles). THREE PROMOTIONS: approval-workflow-orchestrator, recruiting-interview-coordinator, stakeholder-fyi-classifier all CONFIRMED with 2nd-cycle evidence. TWO ARCHIVATIONS: escalation-email-drafter and review-prep-deck-maintenance (4+ cycles absent). incident-doc-coordinator SURGES to 58 occ (from 30). Meeting output ecosystem hits 255 combined occ. Eval ecosystem: 232 occ, 58.83 hrs/wk. New: 14th archetype (External Coordination). New ROI model. Pattern maturity tiers formalized.

patterns.label: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: 170 total across 8 UNBROKEN cycles. +30 this cycle (150 min/wk). Machine-parseable subject prefixes. Most consistent signal in catalog. Promoted to INSTITUTIONAL maturity. AutomationScore raised to 94.

patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +19: meeting notes docs (7), post-meeting workflow chain (12). 93 total, 13.34 hrs/wk. Workflow chain confirmed 2nd consecutive cycle. ValueScore raised to 92. INSTITUTIONAL maturity (8/8 cycles). Highest composite pattern.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Setup, Analysis & Standardized Reporting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +14: status request threads (8), weekly review with leadership (1), evals metrics dashboard (5). 84 total, 18.0 hrs/wk. Highest-value pattern (94). INSTITUTIONAL maturity. Time per week continues to climb.

patterns.label: VoC / Customer Ask Deduplication & Routing
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 8. Structural pattern (role-based). Holds at stable. Mature (7/8 cycles).

patterns.label: Eval Framework Template & Coverage Model Scaffolding
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +7: sprint/feature spec writing (3), RFC/design doc review (2), sprint planning prep (1), design review prep (1). 27 total, 9.5 hrs/wk. Sources expanded to include meeting (prep). ValueScore raised to 90. AutomationScore raised to 82.

patterns.label: Action Items Tracked Across Fragmented Systems
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +8: cross-team dependency tracking threads (8). 30 total, 4.59 hrs/wk. Rising 3rd consecutive cycle.

patterns.label: Weekly Project Status Report Generation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5: weekly digest emails (4), authored status report doc (1). 24 total, 5.5 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles). Friday send cadence reconfirmed. AutomationScore raised to 85.

patterns.label: External Stakeholder Post-Meeting Recap & Follow-Up Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +7: external partner coordination emails (6), stakeholder demo readout (1). 30 total, 5.82 hrs/wk. Steady growth.

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Summary to Loop/PPT Pipeline
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +2: stakeholder demo (1), content review session (1). 25 total, 6.75 hrs/wk. AutomationScore raised to 84.

patterns.label: Customer Engagement SDR & Discovery Note Creation
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles (6,7,8). Approaching archive threshold.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Issue Thread Fragmentation & Context Loss
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +20: stakeholder FYI loops (12), cross-team dependency threads (8). 79 total, 11.5 hrs/wk. Accelerating for 3rd consecutive cycle. ValueScore raised to 90. Fragmentation worsening as team grows.

patterns.label: Personal Daily Prep & Briefing
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5 daily standup prep. 25 total. ParticipantCount=1 limits valueScore.

patterns.label: Recurring Meeting Agenda Preparation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +10: daily standup (5), weekly review (1), sprint planning (1), design review (1), 1:1 (1), all-hands (1). 52 total, 25.59 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles). Highest participant count (6).

patterns.label: Partner & Customer Eval Enablement Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +2: cross-team alignment syncs. 20 total, 12.75 hrs/wk. Stable cadence.

patterns.label: Calendar Overload & Meeting Invite Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +16: meeting invite cascade (15), all-hands (1). 143 total, 35.75 hrs/wk. Cascade pattern reconfirmed: one change triggers 3-5 downstream invites. ValueScore raised to 85.

patterns.label: Action Item Owner Chasing & Status Follow-Up
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +15: PM-engineering decision pings (15 partial). 37 total, 3.82 hrs/wk. Rising for 2nd consecutive cycle.

patterns.label: Training / Hackathon Event Artifact Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles (post Camp AIR). Approaching archive threshold. Will re-emerge when next event triggers.

patterns.label: Customer Signals Aggregation & Planning Tracker Refresh
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Redundant Deck Creation for Overlapping Topics
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +1: content review session deck. 12 total. Low frequency but high per-instance time.

patterns.label: Access Governance & Compliance Alert Triage
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles. High automation, low value. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Copilot / Agent Platform Architecture Q&A
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +20: evals channel threads (15), PM-engineering decision pings (5). 76 total, 13.08 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles). ValueScore raised to 86.

patterns.label: Ownership Routing & DRI Lookup
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Operational FYI Broadcast Email Classification
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5 inferred from leadership AMA overlap. High automation, low value. Stable.

patterns.label: Escalation & Follow-Up Email Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED: No signal for 4 consecutive cycles (5-8). Function likely absorbed by other patterns.

patterns.label: Last-Minute Review Deck Maintenance Before ROBs
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED: No signal for 4 consecutive cycles (5-8). Subsumed by redundant-deck-creation.

patterns.label: FFv2 Flights & Rollout Unblocking Guidance
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED since cycle 6. No signal for 6+ cycles.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Link Chasing & Access Resolution
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 3 consecutive cycles. Declining toward archive.

patterns.label: Incident Documentation & Response Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: SURGING: Cycle 8 +28: evals regression alerts (7), triage meetings (2), on-call incident chat (12), full workflow chain (7). 58 total, 10.0 hrs/wk. Nearly DOUBLED from 30. Alert-triage-resolve-status chain confirmed 2nd cycle. ValueScore raised to 86. AutomationScore 78.

patterns.label: Approval Request & Sign-off Workflow
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED in cycle 8: +5 approval/sign-off threads. 10 total, 1.5 hrs/wk. 4 participants across PM/Director/Finance/Legal. Structured workflow: request, wait, follow-up, respond. Promoted from 'new' to 'candidate'.

patterns.label: Recruiting & Interview Debrief Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED in cycle 8: +8 (2 interview debriefs + 6 recruiting chat messages). 16 total, 2.5 hrs/wk. Doubles from cycle 7. Promoted from 'new' to 'candidate'.

patterns.label: Stakeholder FYI & Visibility Loop Classification
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED in cycle 8: +22 (12 FYI email threads + 10 leadership AMA thread). 34 total, 1.67 hrs/wk. NEARLY TRIPLED from 12. High automation (structured subjects). Promoted from 'new' to 'candidate'.

patternClusters.label: Eval Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Largest cluster by both occurrences (232) and time (58.83 hrs/wk). All 5 members saw new signals in cycle 8. incident-doc-coordinator nearly doubled (30→58). Unified eval-ops skill suite addresses the full eval lifecycle: setup, execute, analyze, report, respond to incidents.

patternClusters.label: Meeting Output Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Highest occurrence-count cluster (267, +61 from cycle 7). Full lifecycle: prep (agenda) → hold → capture (notes) → synthesize (summary) → distribute (email) → track (action items) → chase (nudge). Now LARGEST by time at 59.91 hrs/wk, overtaking eval ecosystem.

patternClusters.label: Event & Program Coordination
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Declining. review-prep-deck-maintenance now ARCHIVED. Two remaining members declining/stable. Cluster may fragment unless next event triggers resurgence.

patternClusters.label: Notification & Triage Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Tied for highest occurrences (267) but efficient at only 13.1 hrs/wk. stakeholder-fyi-classifier CONFIRMED and nearly tripled (12→34). A unified email-classifier skill handles all four patterns with shared classify-route-flag architecture.

workflowChains.label: Email to Meeting to Deck to Follow-up Chain
Alert to Triage to Resolve to Status Chain
steps: Automated alert email fires (evals regression/threshold breach)
On-call engineer initiates Teams triage thread
Triage meeting called if unresolved in 30 min
Root cause documented in Work Tracker
Status update email sent to stakeholders
workflowChains.chainInsight: CONFIRMED in cycle 8. 7 explicit end-to-end instances. 60-120 min per incident. incident-doc-coordinator nearly doubled, validating this chain as a primary time sink.

workflowChains.label: Meeting to Recap to Doc to Tracker Chain
steps: PM/TPM sends recap email within 2 hrs
Shared notes doc updated in SharePoint
Work Tracker tasks created for each AI
workflowChains.chainInsight: 3rd consecutive confirmation. 12 instances this cycle (stable). 90 min/occurrence. Steps 2-5 fully automatable via meeting-notes-action-extractor skill.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and Work Tracker tasks. Handles the entire post-meeting workflow chain.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 13.34 hrs/week across 4 roles. 93 occurrences over 8 cycles. Chain head for 2 workflows. INSTITUTIONAL maturity.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type, priority, and required action. Routes to right role. Filters noise from actionable items.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 8.0 hrs/week. 170 occurrences over 8 unbroken cycles. Highest automation score (94). INSTITUTIONAL maturity.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, metrics dashboards, and coverage data. Produces standardized reports with trend analysis, pass/fail summaries, and leadership-ready decks.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 18.0 hrs/week across 5 roles. Highest value score (94). INSTITUTIONAL maturity.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Generates eval scenario guides, coverage models, feature specs, RFC templates, and acceptance criteria from agent/feature description.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 9.5 hrs/week of parallel template authoring. Rising for 3 consecutive cycles.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Drafts Loop-formatted status reports from ADO sprint data, meeting notes, metrics dashboards, and blockers. Friday cadence.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 5.5 hrs/week of cross-tool aggregation. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles).

candidateSkills.name: voc-ask-deduplicator
candidateSkills.description: RAG-based dedup of Customer Asks against ADO backlog with DRI routing and confidence scoring.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 30+ manual triage events across 8 cycles. Structural pattern.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-summary-publisher
candidateSkills.description: Converts meeting transcript to canonical Loop summary with optional PPT slide generation.

candidateSkills.name: knowledge-context-consolidator
candidateSkills.description: Consolidates fragmented info across Teams, email, SharePoint, and meetings into unified context views per topic/project.
triggerExamples: What do we know about this?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses 11.5 hrs/week of fragmentation across 5 participants. Accelerating for 3 consecutive cycles.

candidateSkills.name: incident-response-doc-generator
candidateSkills.description: Auto-generates incident triage thread, postmortem template, root cause doc, and stakeholder update emails from alert data.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 10.0 hrs/week. SURGING (30→58 occurrences). Core of alert-triage-resolve-status chain.

candidateSkills.name: unified-action-item-tracker
candidateSkills.description: Unified action items across Loop, Teams, email, ADO with dedup, owner assignment, and overdue flagging.
triggerExamples: What are my open action items?

candidateSkills.name: recurring-agenda-generator
candidateSkills.description: Pre-populates recurring meeting agendas from ADO status, blockers, open action items, and prior meeting notes.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Reduces 25.59 hrs/week across 6 participants. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles).

candidateSkills.name: external-meeting-followup-drafter
candidateSkills.description: Drafts post-meeting recap emails for external stakeholders from meeting notes and decisions.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Recommends accept/decline/delegate for meeting invites by priority, calendar load, and focus time protection.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses 35.75 hrs/week calendar overload. Cascade pattern: preventing one change averts 3-5 downstream actions.

candidateSkills.name: copilot-platform-faq-responder
candidateSkills.description: RAG-backed FAQ for Agent 365, eval tooling, and common engineering questions. Deflects repeated Q&A from experts.
triggerExamples: How to set up CLI Evals?
Agent behavior in Teams vs Chat?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Deflects 76 Q&A instances, reclaiming 13.08 hrs/week across 5 roles. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles).
